review_reason: Phases 1-4 complete (core refactoring done, build passes). Phase 5 blocked: upstream LogicalEquivalence.lean incompatible with fork's Proposition type (upstream uses primitive `not` constructor, fork uses derived `neg` abbreviation). Phase 6 blocked (depends on 5).
